name: Piedmont Gold Exchange & Refinery
description_short: Piedmont Gold Exchange & Refinery is a credit repair provider based in Pineville, North Carolina. Rated 4.9/5 with 420 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Piedmont Gold Exchange & Refinery is a credit repair provider serving clients in Pineville, North Carolina. With 420 Google reviews and a 4.9/5.0 rating, Piedmont Gold Exchange & Refinery has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Operating as a gold dealer, Piedmont Gold Exchange & Refinery provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Pineville, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Piedmont Gold Exchange & Refinery operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Pineville, North Carolina area who are considering Piedmont Gold Exchange & Refinery should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
